name: ruby-mime-types-data
title: ruby-mime-types-data
summary: registry for information about MIME media type definitions
description:
registry for information about MIME media type definitions
This package consists of the gem mime-types-data that provides a registry for
information about MIME media type definitions. It can be used with the Ruby
mime-types library or other software to determine defined filename extensions
for MIME types, or to use filename extensions to look up the likely MIME type
definitions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-mime-types-data because registry for information about MIME media type definitions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-mime-types-data as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-mime-types-data with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-mime-types-data --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
